$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker - Pin Wheel Selector (wheel column) component
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Pin Wheel Selector - a single scrolling wheel column (Date, Hour, Minute, or AM/PM) that stacks Pin Wheel item rows and marks the center selection line. NESTED COMPONENT: the item rows are the Pin Wheel component and are tokenized in pin-wheel.json - this file defines only the column-level tokens (container background, row stacking gap, and the top/bottom selection band rule). Figma Reference: Node ID 193-80390

$component.name: Pin Wheel Selector
$component.description: A vertical wheel column composed of stacked Pin Wheel item rows with a highlighted center selection line delineated by a top and bottom rule. One column per unit (date, hour, minute, AM/PM).
$component.structure: Column of Pin Wheel rows stacked flush (no gap). The center (selected) row carries a 1px top and bottom border acting as the selection band; column width hugs its content.

sizes.default: 200px tall (5 x 40px rows); width hugs content

usage.contexts: Date Picker Mobile Pin Wheel (Date / Date+Time) view
usage.features: Stacked Pin Wheel rows, center selection band

background.description: Mobile pin wheel selector column background - neutral base - #ffffff

gap.description: Mobile pin wheel selector gap between stacked item rows - none - 0px (rows sit flush)

width.description: Mobile pin wheel selector selection band top/bottom rule width - default - 1px

color.description: Mobile pin wheel selector selection band top/bottom rule color - neutral default - #d0d5dd
